name: Morocco Glass Lamp - 28 Inch Height - LIT4052 - Mercury - Safavieh
description: Introducing the Morocco 27 inch mercury glass table lamp. This elegant piece combines style and functionality, making it an ideal addition to any room. Crafted with a sleek mercury finish, the lamp offers a sophisticated touch that enhances your decor. Its 27-inch stature provides ample lighting while remaining versatile. The glass material adds a delicate shine, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. Perfect for living rooms or bedrooms, this table lamp complements both modern and traditional styles. Its subtle design ensures it seamlessly integrates into various themes, providing a timeless look. Illuminate your space with the charm and elegance of this beautiful lamp, adding a layer of style to your home.
